name: mining-analyst
description: Comprehensive AI-powered mining project analysis, valuation, basket construction, tokenization, and commodity intelligence for Minestarters RWA platform.
author: Minestarters

plugins.name: mining-analysis
plugins.description: Core mining analysis — resource estimation, mineral valuation, project screening, competitive analysis, and model validation.

plugins.name: exploration
plugins.description: Exploration & prospecting — drill analysis, geological assessment, target mineral analysis, exploration reporting.

plugins.name: project-evaluation
plugins.description: Due diligence & feasibility — feasibility studies, DD checklists, risk assessment, comparable projects, CAPEX/OPEX modeling.

plugins.name: basket-vault
plugins.description: Basket creation & vault management — basket building, NAV tracking, portfolio rebalancing, vault reporting, RPA modeling.

plugins.name: tokenization
plugins.description: RWA tokenization & token economics — ART/MINE token modeling, RWA structuring, compliance screening, oracle verification.

plugins.name: commodity-intelligence
plugins.description: Market intelligence — commodity price forecasting, supply/demand analysis, critical minerals tracking, market briefs.
